CONTENT.Early life: Bobzien is a native of Giessen, Germany.
CONTENT.Club career: Bobzien started his career with German Bundesliga side Mainz 05. He debuted for the club during a 3–0 win over VfB Lübeck. In 2023, he was sent on loan to German side SV Elversberg. In 2023, he was sent on loan to Austrian side SC Austria Lustenau.For the 2024–25 season, he moved on loan to Austria Klagenfurt.
CONTENT.Style of play: Bonzien mainly operates as a forward.
CONTENT.International career: Bobzien has represented Germany internationally at youth level.

SUMMARY: Ben Justus Bobzien (born 29 April 2003) is a German professional footballer who plays as a forward for Austrian club Austria Klagenfurt on loan from Mainz 05.
